description: extract_closing_prices() helper - extracts under/over prices from odds dict with pinnacle>dk>fd priority
log_shadow_signals() gains 3 new kwargs: closing_under_price closing_over_price price_source (all default None)
ST02 record dict now includes closing_under_price closing_over_price price_source
ADJ signal record dicts now include closing_under_price closing_over_price price_source
Caller must import extract_closing_prices and pass prices to log_shadow_signals
